Defendant Cole Thomas Netherwoods Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted the tentative ruling. Defendant Cole Thomas Netherwood's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Respond To Form Interrogatories is granted for reasons set forth in motion, which is unopposed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve responses within fifteen (15) days of the signed order on this motion. The prevailing party is to prepare an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
